narrative: Hawkish RBNZ signals drive NZD outperformance as the central bank holds rates at 2.25% — NZD/USD bids to 0.5901 while the -0.83% real rate remains accommodative; gold higher +0.04%; equities +0.02%; DXY +0.04%; VIX 16.3. USD/JPY holds at 159.45 as 300bp Fed-BoJ carry offsets positive JPY economic surprises. WTI retreats -4.77% toward $89.4, pressuring CAD as USD/CAD firms to 1.3834. Watch US GDP and PCE data tomorrow for USD directional cues.
